profile_url.description: Full Twitter/X profile URL (e.g. https://twitter.com/paulg or https://x.com/paulg)

max_tweets.description: Maximum number of tweets to return (client-side cap after fetching)

days_back.description: Only include tweets from the last N days. Pass 0 to skip date filtering.

include_retweets.description: Whether to include retweets in the output
